raw: THIS PASS DOES NOT NEED TO BE RESERVED! Beginning July 10, 2024, present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. No pass is needed. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission. Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

source_phrases.audience_policies[0].form: 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket
